name: David.github.io
body:
```ruby
class Me
  # David Patterson
  #   - Full time Computer Science student at Kingston University
  #   - Lives in London, United Kingdom
  #   - Enjoys programming and problem solving
  #   - like to go to the gym and keep myself actively fit. 
  #   - Enjoy answering questions on stackoverflow
  TRAITS = %w[reliable trustworthy has_initiative friendly]

  include Skillset
  include Contact

 belongs_to :Waitrose, as: :current_employer

  def ruby_on_rails_experience
    working_with_rails.since '2011'
  end
  
  def work_experience
    belongs_to DAI, from: 2011-2012, as: Junior_Software_Engineer
    belongs_to MIUK, from: 2009(Apr)-2009(Aug) as: Intern_Web_Developer
 end
end
```

***
***

```ruby
module SkillSet
  def skills
    {
      rails:               %w[3.xx],
      testing:             %w[RSpec],
      frontend:            %w[HTML5, CSS3,jQuery,JavaScript],
      templates:           %w[erb],
      deployment:          %w[Heroku, Nginx passenger],
      data_modeling:       true
      authorization:       :cancan,
      authentication:      %w[devise],
      background_jobs:     %w[heroku-scheduler, delyed_jobs],
      version_control:     :git
      database_management: true
      database:            %w[SQL, PL/SQL]     
      other_languages      %w[C,Java,XML]    
      methodologies        :agile 
    }
  end


  def coding_environment
    {
      editor:           'JetBrains RubyMine ',
      operating_system: 'Windows, Linux Mint'
    }
  end
end
```

```ruby
module Contact
    
   def Details
     {
      IRC:              %w[Ruby, RubyOnRails, jQuery-ui] 
      skype:           :k0954342
      email:           :dpatterson2008@hotmail.com
      github           :https://github.com/k0954342
     }
   end 
end 
 ```
